ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the city record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the city record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landmarks" (
  "landmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landmark */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the landmark is located */,
  "landmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the landmark */,
  "landmark_description" TEXT /* Description of the landmark */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file of the landmark */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the landmark was built */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the landmark */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the landmark */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the landmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the landmark record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the landmark record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landmarks_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., add, edit, delete) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., city, landmark) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity on which the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: State where the city is located
Area of the city in square kilometers
Date and time when the city record was created
Date and time when the city record was last updated
ID of the city where the landmark is located
Path to the image file of the landmark
Date and time when the landmark record was created
Date and time when the landmark record was last updated
Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer)
Date and time when the user account was created
Date and time when the user account was last updated
ID of the user who performed the action
Type of action (e.g., add, edit, delete)
ID of the entity on which the action was performed
Date and time when the action was performed
